data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The app design minimizes decision-making time with a clear and intuitive interface.
data.technical_spec: Simple menu options and an intuitive layout reduce cognitive load on users.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interactive elements are designed for easy access on touchscreens, enhancing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Buttons are sized and positioned for fast and easy touchscreen interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: WhatsApp maintains a visually pleasing design that suggests ease of use and efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of color schemes, icons, and typography enhances aesthetic appeal.

data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: The application implements a minimalist design that ensures user tasks are straightforward.
data.technical_spec: Navigational paths are clear and uncluttered, emphasizing key user functions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users expect WhatsApp's interface to resemble familiar applications, which it does.
data.technical_spec: Design patterns consistent with commonly used apps simplify user transition and learning curve.
